metadata.title: Logo Detective by dgodwonchan — Logo Plagiarism Detection Tool
metadata.description: Upload your logo and let AI find similar existing brands, assess plagiarism risk, and provide design feedback.

hero.title: Does this logo look familiar?
hero.description: Upload your logo and AI will find similar real-world brands, assess plagiarism risk, and give you professional design feedback.

upload.replace: Click to replace with another image
upload.drop: Drag and drop your logo or click to select

analyzing.title: AI is analyzing your logo
analyzing.subtitle: This usually takes 10–30 seconds. Please wait a moment.
steps: Evaluating plagiarism risk and generating report

result.clickToOpen: Click image to open original page
result.noSimilarBrands: No significantly similar brands were found. Your design is likely original.

donate.limitDesc: You've used all 5 free analyses today. Help cover AI server costs and enjoy unlimited access for 24 hours. (Any amount welcome)
donate.voluntaryDesc: Logo Detective is free to use. If you found it helpful, a coffee would mean the world!
donate.scanQR: Scan the QR code with your {method} app.
donate.trust: Honor system. We trust designers' integrity.

footer.creator: dgodwonchan
footer.tagline: A designer who listens to designers
footer.disclaimer: AI analysis is for reference only. For legal plagiarism judgment, please consult a professional.

errors.networkError: Cannot connect to server. Please check your internet and try again.
errors.rateLimit: You've used all 5 free analyses today. ☕ Buy me a coffee to unlock 24h unlimited access.
